title: GitHub Actions
command: gh run list --limit 20 --json status,conclusion,workflowName,headBranch,databaseId,event,url 2>/dev/null | jq '[.[] | {icon: "●",iconColor: (if .conclusion == "success" then "#22cc22" elif .conclusion == "failure" then "#cc4444" elif .conclusion == "cancelled" then "#888888" elif .status == "in_progress" or .status == "queued" then "#fad000" else "#aaaaaa" end),title: "\(.workflowName) — \(.headBranch)",description: "\(.event) · \(.conclusion // .status)",action: { shell: "open \(.url) >/dev/null 2>&1 || xdg-open \(.url) >/dev/null 2>&1" }}]'
emptyText: No runs (or gh / jq not installed)
